attempts.strategy: FT.1–FT.3 single-element / perfect-field / Jacobi–Zariski H1Cotangent route from analogies/ftthree-kernel-iter154.md. (FT.1) push D_B b=0 to K=Frac B; reduce to algebraMap B K b ∈ range(algebraMap k K), pull back along injective B↪K. (FT.2) by_contra: if bK transcendental, embed F=Frac(k[X])↪K via IsFractionRing.lift (X↦bK); PerfectField F (char 0) ⟹ FormallySmooth F K ⟹ Subsingleton H1Cotangent ⟹ mapBaseChange k F K injective; mapBaseChange(1⊗D_F X)=D_K bK=0 ⟹ 1⊗D_F X=0 ⟹ (faithful flatness) D_F X=0. (FT.3) base case _ratfunc_D_X_ne_zero contradicts. Algebraic ⟹ _algebraic_mem_range lands b∈range over alg-closed k.
attempts.code_tried: set K := FractionRing B; suffices hbK : algebraMap B K b ∈ (algebraMap k K).range; apply _algebraic_mem_range; by_contra hCon; ... letI algFK : Algebra F K := (IsFractionRing.lift hg).toAlgebra; haveI : Algebra.FormallySmooth F K := Algebra.FormallySmooth.of_perfectField; ... (Module.FaithfullyFlat.one_tmul_eq_zero_iff F (Ω[F⁄k]) _).mp h1tmul; exact _ratfunc_D_X_ne_zero hDFX
attempts.insight: The whole route compiles end-to-end and is axiom-clean (verified {propext, Classical.choice, Quot.sound}, NO sorryAx). Two non-automatic pieces flagged by the strategy-critic resolved cleanly: Algebra F K / IsScalarTower k F K supplied explicitly via letI + IsScalarTower.of_algebraMap_eq; EssFiniteType and PerfectField instances resolved by inferInstance once stated as haveI. The standard-smooth / relative-dimension hypotheses are NOT used by the kernel argument — only [IsDomain B]+[FiniteType k B] to build K and EssFiniteType k K.

next_steps: KDM closed ⟹ ChartAlgebra.lean is 0-sorry and axiom-clean. Downstream df_zero_factors_through_constant_on_chart is now genuinely axiom-clean (no longer sorryAx-laundering). Next critical-path target: rigidity_over_kbar (RigidityKbar.lean:88) is unblocked.
